global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, aerodynamic body. It features vibrant blue plumage with black and white accents. The bird has a pointed beak, a prominent crest on its head, and a long, narrow tail. Its wings are broad and rounded, aiding in agile flight.

part_details.head: Blue with a prominent crest, black and white facial markings.
part_details.wings: Broad, rounded, blue with black and white patterns.
part_details.tail: Long, narrow, blue with black bars.

spatial_relations: The crest is positioned on top of the head.
The wings extend from the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
